zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Laval Dame de Laval於1197年出生在法國麥延賴伐爾時，她的父親Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval27歲，母親Avoise de Craon29歲。她於1215年之前與Robert d'Alençon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1264年4月24日在法國布列塔尼布萊斯特享年67歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼布萊斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Laval Dame de Laval于1197年出生在法国麥延賴伐爾时，她的父亲Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval27岁，母亲Avoise de Craon29岁。她于1215年之前与Robert d'Alençon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1264年4月24日在法国布列塔尼布萊斯特享年67岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼布萊斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Laval Dame de Laval was born in 1197, in Laval, Mayenne, France, her father, Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval, was 27 and her mother, Avoise de Craon, was 29. She married Robert d'Alençon before 1215. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 April 1264, in Brest, Brittany, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Brest, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Laval Dame de Laval est née en 1197, à Laval, Mayenne, France, son père, Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Avoise de Craon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d'Alençon avant 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1264, à Brest, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Brest, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Laval Dame de Laval 1197 in Laval, Mayenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval 27 und ihre Mutter Avoise de Craon 29. Sie hat vor 1215 Robert d'Alençon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. April 1264 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Brest, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Brest, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Laval Dame de Laval è nata il nel 1197 nel Laval, Mayenne, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Avoise de Craon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert d'Alençon prima del 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 aprile 1264, nel Brest, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Brest, Bretagne, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Laval Dame de Laval(이)가 1197년 프랑스 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avoise de Craon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1215년 이전 Robert d'Alençon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 4월 24일 프랑스 브레타그니 브레스트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 브레스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Laval Dame de Laval nasceu em 1197, em Laval, Mayenne, França, seu pai, Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Avoise de Craon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert d'Alençon antes 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1264, em Brest, Bretagne, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Brest, Bretagne, França.

ru.Laval,53130,Mayenne,Pays de la Loire,FRA: лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Laval Dame de Laval родилась в 1197 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Avoise de Craon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert d'Alençon перед 1215 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 апреля 1264 г. в местности брест, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности брест, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Laval Dame de Laval nació en 1197, en Laval, Mayenne, Francia, su papá, Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Avoise de Craon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert d'Alençon antes de 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de abril de 1264, en Brest, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Brest, Bretagne, Francia.
